description_full:
SHD Solutions GmbH

As an industry specialist, SHD offers an integrated system environment – from manufacturers to retailers and end customers. Our portfolio includes ERP systems, design software for kitchens, bathrooms, and living spaces, as well as solutions for warehouse, finance, and HR management, plus IT services and e-commerce concepts. These are complemented by consulting, project management, training, and support.

 
 
 
 

SHD Solutions GmbH is looking for you to join our team as soon as possible!
 Location: Andernach or remote

 
 
 Your challenge with us 
 
 
 
 
 

Do you want to help shape the success of innovative software products and turn complex ideas into clear, compelling messages? Then you’ve come to the right place!
 
 As a Senior Product Marketing Specialist, you will define how SHD products are positioned in the market. You will develop strong value propositions, and clear messaging that translate product capabilities into customer value.
 
 Product Marketing at SHD focuses on market insights, positioning, narrative development and go-to-market strategy. The role works closely with Product Management, Sales, Design and our international marketing team to turn customer and market insights into impactful messaging and GTM initiatives.
 
 Brand, design and content execution are handled by the central marketing organisation and external partners. Product Marketing provides the strategic foundation through positioning, narrative and messaging.

This team is waiting for you
 Join our dynamic and international marketing team of 12 creative minds who are passionate about developing innovative strategies and successfully positioning our brand. You can expect an inspiring work environment where teamwork and fresh ideas are valued. Let’s implement exciting projects together and shape the future of marketing!



Your Responsibilities

Market Analysis & Customer Insights

Analyse markets, competitors, and industry trends to identify opportunities 
Conduct customer research and develop buyer personas and journeys 
Translate insights into actionable recommendations for product and marketing strategy 

Go-to-Market & Positioning

Define value propositions for products and solutions across different target segments 
Develop and drive go-to-market strategies for new and existing products 
Collaborate cross-functionally with Product Management and Sales to ensure alignment

Product Narrative & Messaging

Develop clear product narratives and messaging frameworks 
Translate complex product capabilities into compelling customer value 
Provide strategic messaging input for marketing campaigns and brand communication

Sales Enablement & Content

Develop strategic sales enablement materials such as presentations, battle cards and case studies 
Support the sales team with with positioning, product messaging and differentiation 
Align messaging across product, marketing and sales teams



Your profile

Degree in Marketing, Communications, Business, or a comparable field 
Several years of professional experience in Product Marketing, ideally in an international context 
Experience in the software industry is a real plus 
Familiarity with agile working methods and cross-functional collaboration 
Very good knowledge of Microsoft Office, especially PowerPoint, Outlook, and Teams; JIRA skills are a plus 
Fluent English skills (minimum C1 level) are a must 
German skills are an advantage 
Strong digital competence and a good sense for trends 
Structured, creative, and self-driven working style 
Excellent communication, organizational, and teamwork skills 

Even if you don’t meet every single requirement, but believe you’d be a great fit for us, we’d love to hear from you!



What you can expect

A workplace to feel good in: We offer a modern work environment with an adjacent office park, plus flexible and remote work options.
